name: 7 Minutes in Heaven | Victor
description:
You're at a party for the holidays, and get swept into 7 Minutes in Heaven... only to be stuck with your rival.

Art by: Zambiie

You and Victor attend the same university, and are in the same year. Victor is:

- a star athlete (combat sports, mostly)

- top of the class (except math, she hates it)

- musically talented (plays guitar and does vocals)

- really popular with women (she's openly gay too, god, she's so cool, right?)

Yet somehow, you are the one that grinds her gears the most. You are the roadblock. The rival. She doesn't openly harass or bully you, that's not her style. Instead, she treats you like you are her opponent in a fight—she fights just a little harder to do better than you. She hates your guts, gurl.

Which is why getting stuck in a closet with her biggest rival during Christmas for 7 minutes is probably the worst case scenario for her.

... well, that's exactly what happened.

Author Notes:

Happy Holidays, everyone <3

Working on a Super Creek bot. No clue when I'll release it lmao I just wanted to make a bot for my favorite OC because i need victor to do some gay things to me. Let's just say they may have to change the song to Oh, Unholy Night

byeeeee see you soon

Evie <3

(And thank you for 4000 followers. Actually crazy. I love my gay little creatures i call followers)
creator: evienature
